texto: I haven't got a clue on how to love you like a lover should, how to make you happy or even how to make you stay. I hardly grasp the essence of desire and true affection scares me more than it should, but know that every stutter, every shy glance, every hesitant touch, come from someone who believes in you and I.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a inkness//IG poet: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “I haven't got a clue on how to love you like a lover should, how to make you happy or even how to…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que felicidade, believe, hesitant pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de hesitant e love.
